/pm-competitive-analysis 우리 B2B 분석 제품 경쟁사 분석
/pm-competitive-analysis Who competes in the AI coding assistant space?

commands.name: pm-data-analytics

examples: /pm-data-analytics sql -- users who signed up in last 30 days with 5+ sessions, PostgreSQL
/pm-data-analytics cohort -- analyze retention by signup month from this CSV
/pm-data-analytics abtest -- checkout test: control 4.2%, variant 4.8%, 2 weeks, should we ship?

commands.name: pm-discover

examples: /pm-discover Smart notification system for project management

/pm-discover 프로젝트 관리 도구의 스마트 알림 시스템

commands.name: pm-draft-nda

examples: /pm-draft-nda NDA between Acme Corp and Beta Inc, California, technical specs sharing
/pm-draft-nda Acme와 Beta 간 NDA 초안, 캘리포니아 관할, 기술 스펙 공유

commands.name: pm-execution

examples: /pm-execution prd -- PRD for the new search feature
/pm-execution okrs -- Q3 OKRs for the onboarding team
/pm-execution sprint -- plan next sprint for the checkout team

commands.name: pm-generate-data
commands.description: Generate realistic dummy datasets for testing — CSV, JSON, SQL, or Python script
examples: /pm-generate-data csv 100 rows: id, email, name, created_at
/pm-generate-data json Users with nested addresses, 50 records

commands.name: pm-go-to-market

examples: /pm-go-to-market gtm -- launch plan for our B2B analytics product in Q3

commands.name: pm-growth-strategy

examples: /pm-growth-strategy Design growth loops for our B2B analytics SaaS targeting SMBs
/pm-growth-strategy 우리 마켓플레이스의 성장 루프와 GTM 모션 설계

commands.name: pm-interview
commands.description: Prepare a customer interview script or summarize an interview transcript into structured insights
examples: /pm-interview prep Onboarding experience for enterprise users

commands.name: pm-market-product
commands.description: Creative marketing toolkit — campaign ideas, positioning, value prop statements, product naming. Modular: run all or select modules.
examples: /pm-market-product 5 marketing ideas for our B2B analytics SaaS
/pm-market-product 우리 AI 쓰기 도구 — 포지셔닝, 밸류프롭, 제품 이름 아이디어

commands.name: pm-market-research
commands.description: PM market research workflows — user personas, segmentation, customer journey mapping, competitive analysis, market sizing
examples: /pm-market-research personas -- create personas from these survey responses
/pm-market-research journey -- map the onboarding journey for our SaaS product
/pm-market-research sizing -- size the market for AI writing tools in the US

commands.name: pm-market-scan
commands.description: Comprehensive macro-environment analysis — SWOT, PESTLE, Porter's Five Forces, and Ansoff Matrix in one pass
examples: /pm-market-scan Our fintech product — preparing for board strategy review

commands.name: pm-marketing-growth
commands.description: PM marketing and growth workflows — marketing ideas, positioning, value proposition statements, North Star metrics, product naming
examples: /pm-marketing-growth ideas -- 5 creative marketing ideas for our B2B SaaS
/pm-marketing-growth positioning -- differentiate our product from top 3 competitors
/pm-marketing-growth northstar -- define NSM for our marketplace platform

commands.name: pm-meeting-notes
commands.description: Summarize meeting transcripts into structured notes with decisions and action items
examples: /pm-meeting-notes Extract action items from these notes

commands.name: pm-mode
commands.description: Respond from a PM perspective — user problems, business impact, timelines, trade-offs, and success metrics
examples: /pm-mode Should we add real-time collaboration to our platform?
/pm-mode Prioritize: dark mode, API v2, mobile app, SSO integration
/pm-mode Our churn rate increased 3% this quarter — what should we investigate?

commands.name: pm-north-star
commands.description: Define North Star metric and supporting input metrics with business game classification and validation.
examples: /pm-north-star Define North Star metric for our marketplace platform
/pm-north-star 우리 B2B SaaS의 노스스타 메트릭 정의해줘

commands.name: pm-plan-launch
commands.description: Complete GTM strategy — beachhead segment, ICP, messaging, channels, launch timeline
examples: /pm-plan-launch GTM plan for our new AI feature
/pm-plan-launch 새 AI 기능 출시 GTM 계획
/pm-plan-launch Full launch strategy for Q3 platform release

commands.name: pm-plan-okrs
commands.description: Brainstorm team-level OKRs aligned to company goals — qualitative objectives with measurable key results
examples: /pm-plan-okrs Growth team Q2 — company goal is 50% ARR increase
/pm-plan-okrs Onboarding squad aligned to "improve activation rate"
/pm-plan-okrs 그로스팀 Q2 OKR — 회사 목표 ARR 50% 증가

commands.name: pm-pre-mortem
commands.description: Pre-mortem risk analysis on PRD, launch plan, or feature
examples: /pm-pre-mortem Analyze risks for this PRD before we start
/pm-pre-mortem 이 PRD에 대한 사전 사망 분석 해줘
/pm-pre-mortem Launch plan for Q2 feature X

commands.name: pm-pricing
commands.description: Design a pricing strategy — model analysis, competitive benchmarking, willingness-to-pay estimation, pricing experiments
examples: /pm-pricing SaaS project management tool moving from free to paid
/pm-pricing Should we switch from per-seat to usage-based pricing?
/pm-pricing 무료에서 유료로 전환하는 SaaS 가격 전략

commands.name: pm-privacy-policy
commands.description: Draft a comprehensive privacy policy covering data types, jurisdictions, and GDPR/CCPA compliance.
examples: /pm-privacy-policy Privacy policy for our SaaS app collecting user analytics and account data
/pm-privacy-policy 우리 앱의 개인정보처리방침 초안 — 유저 분석, 계정 데이터 수집

commands.name: pm-product-discovery
commands.description: PM product discovery workflows — ideation, assumption testing, OST, interview synthesis, feature prioritization, experiment design
examples: /pm-product-discovery ost -- build an OST for our checkout conversion problem
/pm-product-discovery ideas-existing -- feature ideas for our SaaS dashboard
/pm-product-discovery assumptions-new -- map risks for our new marketplace MVP

commands.name: pm-product-strategy
commands.description: PM product strategy workflows — vision, Lean Canvas, Business Model Canvas, SWOT, PESTLE, Porter's Five Forces, pricing
examples: /pm-product-strategy strategy -- 9-section canvas for our B2B analytics platform
/pm-product-strategy vision -- vision for our AI writing assistant
/pm-product-strategy lean -- hypothesis canvas for marketplace MVP

commands.name: pm-proofread
commands.description: Review text for grammar, logic, and flow errors — specific corrections without rewriting. Preserve author's voice.
examples: /pm-proofread Proofread this investor pitch deck intro for clarity
/pm-proofread 이 글 맞춤법, 논리, 흐름 검토해줘

commands.name: pm-research-users
commands.description: Comprehensive user research — personas, segmentation, journey maps from research data
examples: /pm-research-users Create personas from these interview notes
/pm-research-users Segment users by behavior and demographics

commands.name: pm-review-resume
commands.description: Comprehensive PM resume review against 10 best practices — structure, impact metrics, keywords, actionable feedback.
commands.argumentHint: <resume text or path> | [job posting if tailoring]
examples: /pm-review-resume Review my resume for Senior PM roles

commands.name: pm-sentinel
commands.description: Run the PM Sentinel autonomous loop — continuous project improvement with YAML state DB, CLI validation gates, evidence-based completion, and forced reminders
examples: /pm-sentinel start         # Initialize and begin executing missions
/pm-sentinel status        # Check current state and next action

commands.name: pm-setup-metrics
commands.description: Design a product metrics dashboard with North Star, input metrics, health metrics, and alert thresholds
examples: /pm-setup-metrics New checkout flow we just launched

commands.name: pm-sprint
commands.description: Sprint lifecycle — plan, retro, or release-notes modes

commands.name: pm-stakeholder-map
commands.description: Map stakeholders on Power x Interest grid with tailored communication plans
examples: /pm-stakeholder-map Map stakeholders for the Q2 platform migration
/pm-stakeholder-map Who to engage for the pricing change initiative

commands.name: pm-strategy
commands.description: Build a comprehensive product strategy using a 9-section Strategy Canvas — vision to defensibility
examples: /pm-strategy [upload existing strategy doc or pitch deck]
/pm-strategy 비디자이너를 위한 AI 디자인 도구 전략

commands.name: pm-tailor-resume
commands.description: Optimize a PM resume for a specific job posting — keyword alignment, experience reframing, strategic optimization.
examples: /pm-tailor-resume Tailor my resume to this job posting [paste JD]

commands.name: pm-test-scenarios
commands.description: Generate comprehensive test scenarios from user stories — happy path, edge cases, error handling
examples: /pm-test-scenarios Generate scenarios from these user stories
/pm-test-scenarios 이 사용자 스토리에서 테스트 시나리오 만들어줘
/pm-test-scenarios Test cases for the checkout flow

commands.name: pm-toolkit
commands.description: PM utility workflows — resume review, NDA drafting, privacy policy generation, grammar/flow checking
examples: /pm-toolkit resume -- review my resume for this Senior PM role
/pm-toolkit resume -- tailor my resume to this job description [paste]
/pm-toolkit nda -- NDA between Acme Corp and Beta Inc, California jurisdiction

commands.name: pm-transform-roadmap
commands.description: Convert feature-list roadmaps to outcome-driven roadmaps
examples: /pm-transform-roadmap Convert this feature list to outcome-driven format

commands.name: pm-triage-requests
commands.description: Analyze and prioritize a batch of feature requests — theme clustering, strategic alignment, priority ranking
commands.argumentHint: <feature requests as text, file, or paste>

commands.name: pm-value-proposition
commands.description: Design a value proposition using a 6-part JTBD template — Who, Why, What Before, How, What After, Alternatives
examples: /pm-value-proposition AI writing tool for non-native English speakers
/pm-value-proposition 비영어권 사용자를 위한 AI 글쓰기 도구 가치 제안

commands.name: pm-write-prd
commands.description: Create a comprehensive Product Requirements Document from a feature idea or problem statement
examples: /pm-write-prd Users are dropping off at onboarding step 3 — needs fixing
/pm-write-prd 기업 고객을 위한 SSO 지원 PRD 작성

commands.name: pm-write-query
commands.description: Generate SQL queries from natural language — BigQuery, PostgreSQL, MySQL. Includes schema detection, CTE optimization, edge case handling.
commands.argumentHint: <natural language query> | <database type> | [schema or table names]
examples: /pm-write-query Users who signed up in last 30 days with 5+ sessions, PostgreSQL
/pm-write-query 최근 30일 내 가입한 사용자 중 세션 5회 이상인 사용자, PostgreSQL

commands.name: pm-write-stories
commands.description: Decompose features into user stories, job stories, or WWA backlog items
examples: /pm-write-stories user Convert this feature to user stories
/pm-write-stories job Breaking down the onboarding flow

commands.name: prd-from-meeting
commands.description: Takes a Notion meeting URL, extracts requirements, researches market context, and produces a complete PRD.

commands.name: prd-lifecycle
commands.description: Run end-to-end PRD lifecycle — research-backed generation, quality gate loop, cascade sync, and stakeholder review
examples: /prd-lifecycle "AI-powered stock screening feature for retail investors"

commands.name: prd-to-issues
examples: /prd-to-issues docs/prd/feature-x.md        # from a specific PRD file
/prd-to-issues --epic "Auth System"          # group under an epic label

commands.name: prd-to-plan
examples: /prd-to-plan                           # plan from PRD in current context
/prd-to-plan docs/prd/feature-x.md     # plan from a specific PRD file

commands.name: sprint-retro-to-issues
commands.description: Convert a sprint retrospective Notion page into tracked GitHub issues on Project #5. Fetches content, runs PM analysis, extracts action items, applies quality critique, and creates issues with full pr

commands.name: sprint-triage
commands.description: Auto-triage incoming GitHub issues and PRs — classify, prioritize, label, and suggest assignees
examples: /sprint-triage --since yesterday            # only items created since yesterday

commands.name: swot
commands.description: Run a SWOT analysis (Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats) on any product, strategy, or decision
commands.argumentHint: <product, company, strategy, or decision to analyze>
examples: /swot Launching a freemium tier for our SaaS
/swot 한국 시장에서의 GPU 클라우드 사업 진출

commands.name: act-as
commands.description: Adopt a specific professional role or character persona with hard boundaries — expertise, vocabulary, priorities, blind spots, and persona boundary enforcement
examples: /act-as Senior Staff Engineer at a FAANG company
/act-as Venture capitalist evaluating a seed-stage startup

commands.name: anti-example
commands.description: Provide a negative example to steer AI away from generic or unwanted outputs — failure injection pattern
commands.argumentHint: <task description> --- <example of what you do NOT want>
examples: /anti-example Write a product launch email --- "We're excited to announce our new product! It has many great features that we think you'll love."
/anti-example Summarize our Q3 performance --- "Q3 was good. Revenue went up and costs went down. We're optimistic about Q4."
/anti-example 기술 블로그 글 작성 --- "오늘은 AI에 대해 알아보겠습니다. AI는 매우 중요한 기술입니다."

commands.name: assumption-audit
commands.description: Force the AI to surface hidden assumptions before analysis — assumption audit pattern
examples: /assumption-audit Should we migrate from PostgreSQL to DynamoDB?
/assumption-audit Is our pricing too low for enterprise customers?
/assumption-audit Will adding a free tier increase conversion?

commands.name: audience
commands.description: Tailor the response to a specific audience's knowledge level, vocabulary, and concerns
examples: /audience executive Why should we invest in observability?
/audience investor Q3 revenue growth from AI features

commands.name: batch
commands.description: Run, monitor, and manage batch processing jobs via batch-agent-runner

commands.name: begin-end
commands.description: Force responses to start and end with specific phrases — bookend format enforcement
examples: /begin-end begin:TL;DR: end:— Generated by AI Assistant What are the key risks of serverless?
/begin-end begin:⚠️ DRAFT — NOT REVIEWED end:--- End of draft --- Write a security policy for API keys
/begin-end begin:## Executive Summary end:## Next Steps Design our Q4 product roadmap

commands.name: briefly
commands.description: Answer in the shortest possible form — no filler, no caveats, just the answer (under 100 words)
examples: /briefly What's the difference between gRPC and REST?
/briefly When should I use useCallback vs useMemo?
/briefly Best Python library for PDF manipulation

commands.name: chain-of-thought
commands.description: Show the complete reasoning chain from premises to conclusion with all intermediate steps
examples: /chain-of-thought Should we migrate from REST to GraphQL?
/chain-of-thought Why is our Kubernetes pod OOMKilled with 4GB memory limit?
/chain-of-thought Is it cheaper to run inference on-prem vs cloud at 10K req/day?

commands.name: checklist
commands.description: Convert any plan, analysis, or answer into an executable checklist with checkboxes, grouping, and priority
examples: /checklist Deploy a new microservice to production
/checklist --prioritized Migrate database from MySQL to PostgreSQL

commands.name: context-stack
commands.description: Maintain and reference multiple layers of context throughout a conversation
examples: /context-stack push We are building a B2B SaaS for GPU cloud management
/context-stack push Target customer: ML teams at Series B+ startups
/context-stack push Constraint: Must support multi-region Kubernetes

commands.name: deep-think
commands.description: Maximum-depth analysis combining chain-of-thought, deliberate thinking, bias check, and self-evaluation in a single pass
commands.argumentHint: <complex question requiring the deepest possible analysis>
examples: /deep-think Should we pivot from B2B SaaS to platform-as-a-service?
/deep-think Is our current multi-tenant architecture going to scale to 10K customers?
/deep-think Evaluate whether we should build vs buy our ML inference stack

commands.name: deliberate-thinking
commands.description: Engage System 2 thinking — slow, careful, methodical analysis before answering
examples: /deliberate-thinking Should we build a multi-tenant architecture or single-tenant?
/deliberate-thinking What's the right pricing model for our GPU cloud platform?
/deliberate-thinking Is our codebase heading toward a complexity cliff?

commands.name: eli5
commands.description: Explain any topic in the simplest possible terms, as if to a 5-year-old — no jargon, only analogies and short sentences

commands.name: eval-self
commands.description: Generate a response, score it against a quality rubric, and auto-revise weak dimensions
commands.argumentHint: <question or task to answer and self-evaluate>
examples: /eval-self Write a technical design doc for migrating to event-driven architecture
/eval-self Explain the trade-offs of different caching strategies
/eval-self Create a runbook for handling database failover

commands.name: exec-summary
commands.description: Generate a C-suite executive summary with situation, key findings, recommendations, and next steps
examples: /exec-summary Q2 revenue dropped 15% despite increased ad spend

commands.name: format-as
commands.description: Re-render any content in a specified format: table, JSON, YAML, CSV, Mermaid, markdown, HTML, XML, or bullets
examples: /format-as table Compare React, Vue, and Angular features
/format-as json List of top 10 tech companies with revenue and employees
/format-as yaml Kubernetes deployment config for a Python app

commands.name: guardrail
commands.description: Set strict constraints that must not be violated in the response — hard boundary enforcement with anchor pattern, constraint ordering, and confidence gate
examples: /guardrail No code examples. No analogies. Expert-level only. --- Explain consensus algorithms
/guardrail Max 200 words. No bullet points. Single paragraph. --- Summarize our Q3 results
/guardrail Korean only. 존댓말. 기술 용어는 영어 병기. --- GPU 클라우드 서비스 소개문 작성

commands.name: jargon
commands.description: Generate a domain-expert response using precise technical terminology — no simplification
examples: /jargon ml Explain the attention mechanism in transformer architectures
/jargon finance What drives the term premium in the yield curve?
/jargon devops Explain GitOps reconciliation loop with Flux vs ArgoCD

commands.name: multi-perspective
commands.description: Analyze a topic from 3-5 distinct professional perspectives, then synthesize areas of consensus and conflict
commands.argumentHint: <topic or decision to analyze from multiple perspectives>
examples: /multi-perspective Should we build or buy an ML inference platform?
/multi-perspective --roles cto,pm,finance Launching a free tier for enterprise SaaS

commands.name: no-autopilot
commands.description: Avoid generic/predictable answers — force novel, non-obvious insights that a Google search wouldn't surface
examples: /no-autopilot Why do most microservice migrations fail?
/no-autopilot What's actually wrong with the current state of AI coding assistants?
/no-autopilot The real reason startups fail at Series B

commands.name: parallel-lenses
commands.description: Apply 3-5 analytical frameworks simultaneously to a topic and cross-reference for blind spots and synthesis
examples: /parallel-lenses Why is our user retention dropping?
/parallel-lenses Should we pivot from B2B to B2C?
/parallel-lenses --lenses first-principles,systems-thinking,game-theory Market entry strategy for Southeast Asia

commands.name: reflective-mode
commands.description: Generate a response, then critically reflect on its quality, gaps, and potential improvements
examples: /reflective-mode Design an API rate limiting strategy for our multi-tenant platform
/reflective-mode What's the best way to handle state management in our React app?
/reflective-mode Evaluate our current backup and disaster recovery strategy

commands.name: reframe
commands.description: Force the AI to argue the opposite position with equal conviction — the reframe test
examples: /reframe "We should use microservices for the new platform"
/reframe "React is the best choice for our frontend"
/reframe "Hiring senior engineers is more cost-effective than training juniors"

commands.name: rewrite-as
commands.description: Rewrite text in a specified style while preserving the original meaning — formal, casual, academic, journalistic, and more
examples: /rewrite-as formal Hey, the deploy broke again lol, can someone check?
/rewrite-as academic This study shows AI is getting better at coding
/rewrite-as casual The quarterly earnings exceeded analyst expectations by 12%

commands.name: role-task-format
commands.description: Define a precise role, task, and output format for structured generation (Role:Task:Format pattern)
examples: /role-task-format role:Senior SRE task:Design an incident response runbook for database failover format:numbered checklist with severity tags
/role-task-format role:Financial Analyst task:Evaluate the ROI of migrating to Kubernetes format:executive memo with tables
/role-task-format role:UX Researcher task:Create interview questions for onboarding flow usability format:grouped by theme with follow-up probes

commands.name: specificity
commands.description: Force every claim to become 3x more specific — the specificity ladder pattern
examples: /specificity "We have a strong team with relevant experience"

commands.name: step-by-step
commands.description: Break down any reasoning or execution process into numbered sequential steps with clear logic, rationale, and optional checkpoint gates
commands.argumentHint: <question or task to decompose into steps>
examples: /step-by-step How do I deploy a FastAPI app to Kubernetes?
/step-by-step Debug why my React component re-renders infinitely
/step-by-step 신규 SaaS 제품의 가격 정책을 어떻게 설계해야 할까?

commands.name: systematic-bias-check
commands.description: Identify and flag potential biases in a response, analysis, or dataset with debiased alternatives
commands.argumentHint: <text, analysis, or topic to check for bias>
examples: /systematic-bias-check Our analysis shows microservices are always better than monoliths
/systematic-bias-check This market research concludes AI will replace 80% of jobs by 2030
/systematic-bias-check Our user interview findings from 5 enterprise customers

commands.name: tldr
commands.description: Condense any long text, URL, or file into a concise summary preserving only the key points
commands.argumentHint: <text, URL, or file path to summarize>

commands.name: tone
commands.description: Set the emotional register and formality level for the response
examples: /tone formal Explain our platform's multi-tenant architecture to a potential enterprise customer
/tone casual What's the deal with Kubernetes pod scheduling?
/tone encouraging Review this junior developer's first PR

commands.name: 199-deep-research
commands.description: Run 199 Deep Research — enterprise-grade autonomous research pipeline producing citation-backed reports with source credibility scoring, multi-provider search, and automated validation

commands.name: auto-research
commands.description: Run the AutoResearchClaw 23-stage autonomous research pipeline — transforms a research topic into a conference-ready paper with real literature, sandbox experiments, peer review, and LaTeX export

commands.name: auto-research-distribute
commands.description: Distribute AutoResearchClaw outputs (paper, LaTeX, experiments) to Notion, Slack, NotebookLM, PPTX, and paper-archive

commands.name: autoresearch
commands.description: Run AutoResearchClaw 23-stage pipeline and distribute results to Notion, Slack, PPTX, NLM, and archive
examples: /autoresearch "Autonomous AI agents for financial market analysis"

commands.name: deep-research-pipeline
commands.description: Run deep web research, 12-role cross-perspective analysis, and publish all results to Notion

commands.name: paper-archive
commands.description: Manage the paper archive — register, search, browse, deduplicate, and sync papers across NotebookLM and Notion.

commands.name: paper-lifecycle
commands.description: Run end-to-end research paper lifecycle — discover, scout, review or generate slides, archive, and distribute

commands.name: paper-review
examples: /paper-review paper.md --skip-pm                             # review + docs only, no PM analysis

commands.name: paper-trade
commands.description: Validate trading signals via Alpaca paper trading

commands.name: autoskill-evolve
examples: /autoskill-evolve --scope recent      # default: 5 most recent unprocessed transcripts

commands.name: autoskill-status
examples: /autoskill-status --skill <name>     # show evolution history for a specific skill

commands.name: future-skills-audit
examples: /future-skills-audit quick                # Quick assessment (1 top finding per area)

commands.name: kwp-audit
commands.description: Audit Knowledge Work Plugin rules. Check for upstream updates, list installed plugins, and report rule statistics without making changes.
examples: /kwp-audit --stats           # Show file size and count statistics

commands.name: kwp-sync
commands.description: Sync Knowledge Work Plugins from GitHub. Updates existing rules and adds new ones from anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins.
examples: /kwp-sync engineering        # Sync only the engineering plugin

commands.name: skill-guide-sync
examples: /skill-guide-sync --dry-run          # gap analysis only, no file changes
/skill-guide-sync --scope tab-*      # only document skills matching prefix

commands.name: skill-seekers
commands.description: Convert GitHub repos, doc sites, PDFs, or videos into structured Cursor skill files with conflict detection

commands.name: sp-brainstorm
commands.description: Brainstorm and refine ideas into fully formed designs before implementation. Explores intent, requirements, alternatives, and gets user approval.

commands.name: sp-execute
commands.description: Execute an implementation plan in batches with review checkpoints. Dispatches subagents per task with spec and quality review.

commands.name: sp-feature
examples: /sp-feature [description of the feature or link to issue]

commands.name: sp-pipeline
commands.description: Full Superpowers development pipeline: brainstorm design -> write plan -> execute with TDD -> code review -> finish branch. End-to-end workflow.

commands.name: sp-plan
commands.description: Create a detailed implementation plan with bite-sized tasks (2-5 min each) from an approved design. Each task has exact file paths, code, and verification steps.

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Perform a non-destructive cross-artifact consistency and quality analysis across spec.md, plan.md, and tasks.md after task generation.

commands.name: clarify
commands.description: Identify underspecified areas in the current feature spec by asking up to 5 highly targeted clarification questions and encoding answers back into the spec.

commands.name: constitution
commands.description: Create or update the project constitution from interactive or provided principle inputs, ensuring all dependent templates stay in sync.

commands.name: implement
commands.description: Execute the implementation plan by processing and executing all tasks defined in tasks.md

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Execute the implementation planning workflow using the plan template to generate design artifacts.

commands.name: specify
commands.description: Create or update a single umbrella feature specification from a natural language description, optionally referencing multiple existing spec files via @paths.

commands.name: tasks
commands.description: Generate an actionable, dependency-ordered tasks.md for the feature based on available design artifacts.

commands.name: e2e-overhaul
commands.description: Comprehensive E2E test overhaul: run all tests, triage failures, fix with parallel agents, extend coverage, browser-verify all tabs, achieve 100% pass rate.

commands.name: e2e-test
commands.description: Run Playwright E2E tests: check prerequisites, execute tests, analyze failures, and suggest fixes.

commands.name: playwright-run
examples: /playwright-run <url>                # Quick test a URL (navigate, screenshot, report)

commands.name: test-plan
commands.description: Create a test plan with test strategy, test case generation, coverage analysis, and regression scope determination.

commands.name: test-suite
examples: /test-suite                            # diff mode — test files from uncommitted changes
/test-suite today                      # today mode — all test files changed today
/test-suite full                       # full mode — entire project test audit

commands.name: ceo-brief
commands.description: Weekly executive business summary: pipeline changes, closed deals, risk items, next week's priorities as a one-pager.

commands.name: check-fact
examples: /check-fact "This project uses GraphQL and manages routing with auto_route"
/check-fact "JWT is used for authentication, and Firebase Auth is not used"

commands.name: compare
commands.description: Compare 2-4 items across consistent dimensions with a structured matrix and a clear recommendation
examples: /compare React vs Vue vs Svelte for a dashboard app
/compare PostgreSQL vs MySQL for time-series data
/compare --weighted Kubernetes vs Docker Swarm vs Nomad

commands.name: fact-check
examples: /fact-check <file-path>          # verify specific file (.html, .md, or any text)

commands.name: first-principles
examples: /first-principles "SaaS 가격 정책은 왜 구독 모델이어야 하나?"

commands.name: grill-me
examples: /grill-me "Add user authentication"    # interview about a specific feature

commands.name: model-debate
examples: /model-debate "should we build vs buy an auth system?"
/model-debate --roles "CTO,PM,Security" "API key vs OAuth for our SDK"

commands.name: pitfalls
commands.description: List 5-10 things that could go wrong with a plan, decision, or implementation — with severity, likelihood, and mitigation
examples: /pitfalls Migrating our primary database from PostgreSQL to CockroachDB
/pitfalls Launching a self-serve GPU rental platform
/pitfalls --pre-mortem We're planning to rewrite the frontend in Svelte

commands.name: refine-leadership
commands.description: 리더십 커뮤니케이션 원칙을 적용해 글을 변환 — 전달 방식 정제, 맥락 우선, 기대치 명확화, 주니어 성장 가이드 삽입

commands.name: role-dispatch
examples: /role-dispatch {topic} --roles cto,pm,security  # analyze from specific roles only

commands.name: scqa-writing
examples: /scqa-writing "AI 에이전트가 SaaS를 대체한다는 주제로 블로그 글"
/scqa-writing "Recommend switching from Jira to Linear" --format memo

commands.name: agent-desk
commands.description: Run multi-agent trading desk with bull/bear debate

commands.name: ai-quality
examples: /ai-quality <date>                        # Evaluate report for a specific date
/ai-quality compare <date1> <date2>       # Compare quality between two dates

commands.name: alphaear-deepear-lite
commands.description: Comprehensive financial analysis orchestrating all AlphaEar skills

commands.name: alphaear-intel
commands.description: Run 3-layer AlphaEar intelligence pipeline — parallel data collection, parallel analysis, and report generation with optional visualization

commands.name: alphaear-logic-visualizer
commands.description: Create Draw.io XML diagrams to visualize financial logic chains and transmission flows

commands.name: alphaear-news
commands.description: Fetch real-time financial news from 10+ sources and Polymarket prediction market data

commands.name: alphaear-predictor
commands.description: Market prediction using Kronos time-series model with news-aware adjustments

commands.name: alphaear-reporter
commands.description: Plan, write, and edit professional financial reports from analysis signals

commands.name: alphaear-search
commands.description: Finance-specific web search (Jina/DDG/Baidu) and local RAG search

commands.name: alphaear-sentiment
commands.description: Analyze financial text sentiment using LLM (default) or FinBERT (optional)

commands.name: alphaear-signal-tracker
commands.description: Track investment signal evolution — Strengthened, Weakened, or Falsified

commands.name: alphaear-stock
commands.description: Search A-Share/HK/US stock tickers and retrieve OHLCV price history

commands.name: daily-stock-check
commands.description: Run daily stock analysis (Turtle Trading + Bollinger Bands) and post results to #h-daily-stock-check Slack channel

commands.name: kis-auth
commands.description: KIS authentication management — check status, authenticate VPS/prod/WebSocket, switch modes

commands.name: kis-help
commands.description: KIS plugin help — command listing, agent overview, common workflows, and error code reference

commands.name: kis-my-status
commands.description: KIS account status — balance, holdings, and KOSPI/KOSDAQ index

commands.name: kis-setup
commands.description: KIS environment diagnostics — check prerequisites, dependencies, and configuration with step-by-step remediation

commands.name: mirofish
commands.description: Run MiroFish multi-agent swarm simulation — daily stock mode (auto-seed from today's analysis) or ad-hoc scenarios
commands.argumentHint: [daily report file or custom scenario description]
examples: /mirofish -- Run daily stock simulation from today's data
/mirofish @outputs/reports/daily-2026-03-16.docx -- Simulate based on today's daily report
/mirofish -- What if NVIDIA announces a 10:1 stock split? Simulate market reactions.

commands.name: mirofish-financial
commands.description: Run MiroFish financial market scenario simulation — predict market reactions to Fed decisions, earnings surprises, macro events using swarm AI agents
examples: /mirofish-financial -- Simulate market reaction to NVIDIA 10:1 stock split announcement
/mirofish-financial -- What happens if the Fed announces a surprise 50bp rate cut?
/mirofish-financial -- Predict 30-day S&P 500 trajectory after CPI prints at 5.2% vs 4.1% consensus

commands.name: mirofish-opinion
commands.description: Run MiroFish public opinion simulation — predict social media reactions, crisis dynamics, and stakeholder responses using swarm AI agents
examples: /mirofish-opinion -- Simulate public reaction if our CEO makes a controversial political statement
/mirofish-opinion -- Predict 7-day social media trajectory after a product recall announcement
/mirofish-opinion -- How would Chinese social media react to a new data privacy regulation?

commands.name: money-machine
commands.description: Run the full autonomous money-making pipeline end-to-end

commands.name: options-theta
commands.description: Run options theta trading analysis using 12 professional quant firm prompts (0DTE, iron condor, regime, skew, earnings IV crush, etc.)

commands.name: stock-content
commands.description: Generate and distribute stock analysis content across Twitter, YouTube, Newsletter, Affiliate, and Outreach channels

commands.name: stock-csv-download
commands.description: Download stock price CSVs from investing.com and import into database

commands.name: tab-all
commands.description: Run all 12 tab automation skills sequentially with proper dependency ordering — equivalent to the full daily pipeline

commands.name: tab-analysis-run
commands.description: Run event study analysis, generate reports, and refresh pattern aggregation

commands.name: tab-bollinger-refresh
commands.description: Refresh Bollinger Bands signals for all tracked symbols across 4 methods

commands.name: tab-dualma-refresh
commands.description: Refresh DualMA strategy indicators and signals for all tickers

commands.name: tab-event-detect
commands.description: Trigger event detection from RSS feeds — detects and scores events automatically

commands.name: tab-fundamental-sync
commands.description: Sync quarterly financial statements from Yahoo Finance for all tickers

commands.name: tab-genai-features
commands.description: Generate AI-powered prediction features and sentiment scores

commands.name: tab-hot-stock-discovery
commands.description: Discover hottest untracked stocks from NASDAQ 100, KOSPI 100, KOSDAQ 100

commands.name: tab-llm-agents
commands.description: Run LLM agent pipeline and refresh macro economic data

commands.name: tab-screening
commands.description: Run multi-factor stock screening combining fundamental and technical signals

commands.name: tab-stock-sync
commands.description: Sync stock prices from Yahoo Finance to PostgreSQL for all tracked tickers

commands.name: tab-technical-analysis
commands.description: Pre-compute technical analysis indicators for all tracked tickers

commands.name: tab-turtle-refresh
commands.description: Refresh Turtle Trading indicators for all active instruments

commands.name: today
commands.description: Run daily data sync, hot stock discovery, analysis, and report pipeline — check DB/CSV gaps, backfill missing data, discover trending stocks, run stock analysis, generate .docx report, and optionally

commands.name: toss-ops
commands.description: Run unified Toss Securities operations — snapshot, parallel monitoring (FX/risk/recon/watchlist), signal bridge, and reporting

commands.name: tossinvest-check
commands.description: Consolidated Toss Securities check — account summary, portfolio positions, pending orders, and session status

commands.name: tossinvest-journal
commands.description: Trade journal analytics — view logged trades, monthly P&L, win rate, strategy breakdown, and generate performance reports

commands.name: tossinvest-morning
commands.description: Morning portfolio briefing — account state, positions with overnight P&L, pending orders, risk snapshot, and market context from Toss Securities

commands.name: tossinvest-recon
commands.description: Reconcile Toss Securities holdings against pipeline analysis signals — detect drift, mismatches, and missed opportunities

commands.name: tossinvest-trade
commands.description: Interactive Toss Securities trading with mandatory 6-layer Safety Model enforcement

commands.name: trading-backtest
commands.description: Design and validate a trading strategy with systematic backtesting methodology
commands.argumentHint: Strategy description (e.g., 'Turtle breakout on NASDAQ 100 stocks with 20-day Donchian channel')

commands.name: trading-daily-market
commands.description: Run daily market monitoring: breadth analysis + market news + sector rotation

commands.name: trading-data-quality
commands.description: Validate data quality in market analysis reports before publication

commands.name: trading-edge-research
commands.description: Run edge research pipeline: convert market observations into research tickets and hypotheses
commands.argumentHint: Market observation or strategy context (e.g., 'NVDA formed a VCP base with contracting volume near earnings')

commands.name: trading-finviz-screen
commands.description: Translate natural-language stock screening requests into FINVIZ screener filters
commands.argumentHint: Natural language query (e.g., 'high dividend large-cap value stocks with low P/E')

commands.name: trading-intel
commands.description: Run full market intelligence analysis — dispatch 4 analyst agents in parallel (macro, sector, news, technical), synthesize findings, and optionally deep-dive on a specific ticker

commands.name: trading-market-breadth
commands.description: Comprehensive market breadth analysis: breadth scoring + uptrend ratio + top detection

commands.name: trading-options
commands.description: Run options trading analysis: strategy selection, Greeks, P/L simulation, and theta income planning
commands.argumentHint: Ticker and context (e.g., 'AAPL earnings next week, expecting 5% move' or 'SPY iron condor for weekly income')

commands.name: trading-position-size
commands.description: Calculate risk-based position size for a stock trade
commands.argumentHint: TICKER entry:PRICE stop:PRICE account:SIZE risk:PCT (e.g., AAPL entry:185 stop:178 account:100000 risk:1.0)

commands.name: trading-scenario-analysis
commands.description: Analyze news headlines to build 18-month scenario projections with sector impacts
commands.argumentHint: News headline or topic (e.g., 'Fed rate cut expectations', 'AI chip export controls')

commands.name: trading-stock-research
commands.description: Deep-dive individual stock research: fundamentals + technicals + peer comparison

commands.name: trading-weekly-review
commands.description: Run weekly strategy review: sector rotation + technicals + macro + bubble risk

commands.name: weekly-stock-update
commands.description: Fetch recent stock prices from Yahoo Finance and upsert into PostgreSQL

commands.name: air-gap
commands.description: Run pipeline skills in air-gap mode — route LLM calls to on-premises endpoints with approval gates and audit logging
examples: /air-gap /today                             # run daily pipeline in air-gap mode
/air-gap /deep-review                       # run code review in air-gap mode
/air-gap /ship                              # run ship pipeline in air-gap mode

commands.name: automation-strategy
examples: /automation-strategy assess <process>     # Score a process for automation potential
/automation-strategy audit                # Full automation audit of all processes

commands.name: full-stack-plan
commands.description: Generate a comprehensive multi-phase implementation plan that maps a high-level goal to all available skills with phase decomposition, skill assignments, mermaid diagrams, and concurrency strategies.

commands.name: meta-harness
commands.description: Run Meta-Harness outer-loop optimization — code-level harness mutations with filesystem-based uncompressed history and Pareto frontier tracking

commands.name: open-multi-agent
commands.description: Build and orchestrate multi-agent TypeScript applications using the open-multi-agent framework

commands.name: pipeline-build
examples: /pipeline-build                           # Interactive: describe what you want to automate
/pipeline-build github <description>      # Generate a GitHub Actions workflow

commands.name: plans
commands.description: Optimize a raw prompt using prompt-architect frameworks, then decompose it into a skill-based execution plan with task delegation and dependency ordering.
